notes: v1.14.75 - Optic Verify Rx-power check (roadmap next-1-3 #3): the Verify result now offers a gloved numeric keypad to enter measured Rx, judged against the matched optic's reach thresholds from OPTIC_DB (SR/DR/LR/ER) instead of universal hardcoded numbers - so a long-reach link (e.g. ER4 at -20 dBm) reads GREEN, not a false alarm. Verdict: below alarm=RED, below min=YELLOW(marginal), above max=YELLOW(high), in spec=GREEN; DAC/AOC/unknown reach hides the check (no Rx spec). 'Log Rx Reading' appends the reading + verdict to the audit trail. Logic unit-tested (12 cases), headless-verified. SKU-match verdict and the CLI-paste renderDOM path unchanged (renderDOM threshold fix deferred - optic unknown there).
